appointment.availabilityFullyBooked: No free slots on this day.

errors.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

admin.workingHours.help: Set availability per therapist (weekday, hours, location).
admin.workingHours.error: Could not save (check overlaps and that end is after start).
admin.workingHours.blockOverlapWarn: Block saved. {n} appointment(s) in this period remain scheduled (they were not cancelled). Review them in the agenda.
admin.overview.intro: Manage clinic, staff, services and locations.
admin.overview.settingsDesc: Clinic details, preferences, reminders and billing.

admin.settings.deletePasswordHint: Protects permanent deletion of appointments. Initial value: 1234. Leave blank to keep the current one.
admin.staff.title: Staff
admin.staff.searchEmpty: No staff member matches the search.
admin.staff.deleteHasActivity: Cannot delete: the therapist has appointments, records, or history. Deactivate instead.
admin.staff.tempPasswordNotice: Temporary password. Share it with the new staff member via a secure channel:
admin.staff.lastOwnerBlocked: The clinic must keep at least one active owner.
admin.staff.ownerTierBlocked: Only an owner can assign or change the owner role.
admin.staff.emailTakenBlocked: That email is already used by another staff member.
admin.staff.inviteEmailSent: Invite email sent. The new member sets their own password via the link.
admin.staff.inviteEmailFailed: The invite email could not be sent.
admin.staff.alreadyInvitedBlocked: A staff member with that email already exists.
admin.invite.email.subject: Welcome to OsteoJP — set your password
admin.invite.email.intro: An account has been created for you on the OsteoJP platform. To get started, set your password using the link below:
admin.invite.email.outro: This link is single-use and expires for security. If you weren't expecting this invitation, please ignore this email.
admin.services.title: Services
admin.services.name: Name
admin.services.deleteBlockedTooltip: Cannot delete: this service has appointments, associations or per-location prices. You can archive it.
admin.services.deleteHasReferences: Cannot delete: the service has appointments, associations or per-location prices. Archive it instead.
admin.locations.title: Locations
admin.locations.name: Name
admin.locations.deleteBlockedTooltip: Cannot delete: appointments reference this location. Archive it instead.
clinical.title: Clinical Records
clinical.subtitle: View and manage your patients’ clinical records.
clinical.fichaMedicaHelp: All new records use the Medical Record template.
clinical.episodeNoRecords: No records in this episode yet.
clinical.emptyHelp: Create the first record from an appointment.
clinical.errorHelp: Check your connection and try again.
clinical.signLockConfirm: Signing locks the record permanently. Continue?
clinical.lockedNotice: Record finalized and immutable. Create a new version to make changes.
clinical.finalized: Record already finalized; it cannot be changed.
clinical.cameraDenied: Could not access the camera. Check the browser permissions.
clinical.cameraUnsupported: The camera is not available in this browser.
consultation.title: Start consultation
consultation.name: Name
consultation.consentLabel: The patient consents to the audio recording of this consultation for clinical support.
recording.micError: Could not access the microphone. Check the browser permissions.
recording.unsupported: Consultation recording is only available in Google Chrome. Open this page in Chrome to record.
recording.uploadError: Could not upload the recording. If it persists, contact support (the origin may need to be allow-listed on storage).
recording.savedPending: Recording saved. Processing will be retried.
clinical.bodychartHint: Click the diagram to place a marker.
clinical.mobilidadeHint: Click a circle to place a marker. Use the arrow keys and Enter to place by keyboard.
clinical.signatureHelp: The patient signs on screen. The image is saved to the patient's Documents.
clinical.signatureReadOnly: Finalized record: a signature can no longer be added.
clinical.rgpdHelp: Generates an A4 form with the clinic logo to print and sign by hand.
clinical.consentPendingNotice: PENDENTE-JP: provisional consent text, pending confirmation by JP (Q-W5-3).
clinical.consent.pdfDraftNotice: PENDENTE-JP: provisional draft for printing. Final wording pending confirmation by JP (Q-W5-3).
clinical.consent.rgpd.label: Personal data processing (GDPR)
clinical.consent.rgpd.body: [PENDENTE-JP] I authorize the processing of my personal and health data by OsteoJP for the purpose of providing care, under the GDPR. Provisional text pending confirmation by JP.
clinical.consent.rgpd.v1: [PENDENTE-JP v1] I declare that I authorize the processing of my personal and clinical data by OsteoJP, solely for the purpose of providing healthcare, under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
clinical.consent.rgpd.v2: [PENDENTE-JP v2] I consent to OsteoJP collecting and processing my personal and health data for the purpose of clinical follow-up, and I may exercise my rights of access, rectification and erasure under the GDPR.
clinical.consent.rgpd.v3: [PENDENTE-JP v3] I authorize the processing of my personal and health data by OsteoJP for the provision and management of healthcare, understanding that the data is stored securely and only for the period necessary, in accordance with the GDPR.
clinical.consent.sms.label: SMS reminders
clinical.consent.sms.body: [PENDENTE-JP] I agree to receive appointment reminders by SMS on my mobile number. Provisional text pending confirmation by JP.
clinical.consent.sms.v1: [PENDENTE-JP v1] I authorize OsteoJP to send me appointment reminders by SMS message to the mobile number I have provided.
clinical.consent.sms.v2: [PENDENTE-JP v2] I consent to receiving appointment reminders by SMS, understanding that I may withdraw this consent at any time at reception.
clinical.consent.sms.v3: [PENDENTE-JP v3] I agree to be contacted by SMS for appointment reminders and confirmations, without this implying marketing communications.
clinical.consent.dataHandling.label: Data retention and sharing
clinical.consent.dataHandling.body: [PENDENTE-JP] I have been informed how my data is retained and, when necessary, shared as part of my care. Provisional text pending confirmation by JP.
clinical.consent.dataHandling.v1: [PENDENTE-JP v1] I declare that I have been informed about the secure retention of my clinical data and its possible sharing with other professionals involved in my care, when strictly necessary.
clinical.consent.dataHandling.v2: [PENDENTE-JP v2] I acknowledge that my health data is kept confidential and only shared with my consent or when required by law.
clinical.consent.dataHandling.v3: [PENDENTE-JP v3] I have been informed about how my clinical data is retained, accessed and shared, and about my rights as a data subject under applicable law.
review.title: Review Consultation Queue

auth.setPassword.updateFailed: Could not set the password. The link may have expired — request a new invite.
auth.setPassword.expiredBody: This set-password link is no longer valid. Ask your clinic administrator for a new invite.
auth.setPassword.invalidBody: We couldn't validate this link. Open the most recent link from your invite email, or request a new one.
